statement: In every magma, Equation 1968 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (z * z)`) implies Equation 3722 (`x * y = (x * y) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0724
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op z z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op x y) (op x y))
